concepts.name: Inspire
concepts.visualThesis: A confident dark editorial magazine site. It should feel like a luxury independent publication translated into a premium consultation-led care website.
concepts.colourThesis: Deep sage and ink dominate. Ivory appears as controlled reading relief. Bronze appears as vertical rules, underlines, section numbers, and quiet CTA detail. Blush is almost absent.

concepts.imageStrategy: Selective full transparent portraits in sections 1, 5, and 8; object-fit contain only.
